checks.finding: All AC-NNN identifiers cited in tasks.md Requirements fields resolve to real entries in acceptance-tests.md's table. No dangling AC ID found.

All 11 tasks (T-001..T-011) have a Blockers field that is either the literal 'None' or a comma-separated T-NNN list. No range notation or prose found. Consistent with precheck-result.json's blockers_format_valid: true.
REQ-001..REQ-011 each appear in at least one task's Requirements field and in traceability.md's Requirement column. No uncovered requirement.
AC-001..AC-017 are each traceable via a task Requirements field. No uncovered AC.
All 11 tasks cite at least one REQ-NNN in their Requirements field. No orphan task found.
No task title contains 'test', 'spec', or 'verify', and no task's scope is exclusively test-file changes. This check has no in-scope surface to flag.
All 11 tasks show 'Approval: Draft' and 'Status: Planned'. No task has an invalid or missing Approval/Status field.
All 11 tasks declare both Risk and Required Workflow, and every pairing matches the risk-gate-matrix. Consistent with precheck-result.json's workflow_match_precheck: PASS.

AC-016 is still claimed by both T-002 (Requirements field: 'REQ-002, REQ-003, REQ-011, AC-002, AC-004, AC-013, AC-016') and T-004 (Requirements field: 'REQ-001, REQ-002, AC-001, AC-016') with no differentiated verification in T-002. T-002's Done When contains no item testing AC-016's actual criterion (update-mode confirmation re-run); T-004 is the sole functional owner and tester of AC-016. This is an undifferentiated duplicate claim, not an acceptable unit/integration split (unlike AC-011 in T-001/T-010, AC-004 in T-002/T-003, or AC-001 in T-004/T-010, each of which has explicit, distinct Done-When verification in both owning tasks).
Every task ID referenced in a Blockers field exists in dependency-graph.json's nodes array and as a real task heading in tasks.md. No dangling blocker reference found.
BLOCKERS-FORMAT result is PASS, so this check runs. Traversed dependency-graph.json's edges via depth-first search from every node; no path revisits a node. No cycle detected.
Task titles using 'and' each connect tightly coupled facets of one coherent concern, not two independent feature concerns. No task bundles unrelated features.
Each task's Done When list contains, beyond shared boilerplate, at least one concrete, named verification artifact or fixture outcome. No forbidden-phrase vague criterion found.

All 11 task IDs appear at least once in traceability.md's Code Target column. All requirement IDs in traceability.md exist in requirements.md. Full-profile layer-anchor check: each requirement row cites either a verified canonical layer-spec anchor or a reasoned N/A -- cross-layer only value. No dangling reference in either direction.
